flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Ventura College rose 29% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $4.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Ventura College rose 27% between 2007 and 2010 ($644 → $818).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Ventura College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.1k → $9.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Ventura College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.2% → 0.0%).
